title: Slim Case for iPad 10.2 inch 9th/8th/7th Generation (2021/2020/2019), Tri-fold Smart Bracket Protective Cover with Translucent Hard Frosted Shockproof PC backplate, Auto Wake/Sleep, Black
features: Compatibility : Designed exclusively for iPad 9th Generation 2021 / iPad 8th Generation 2020 / iPad 7th Generation 10.2" 2019 tablet (Model: A2602, A2603, A2604, A2605, A2270, A2428, A2429, A2430, A2197, A2198, A2200). Note: DO NOT fit other Tablet.

Premium Materials: Featuring a premium PU leather shell and a hard PC semi-transparent frosted back cover, this case offers all-around protection against fingerprints, impacts, and scratches. The semi-transparent frosted back cover protects your device while allowing you to see the iPad logo through your preferred color.

Two-Angle Stand Function: The tri-fold front cover flips up, transforming the tablet case into a viewing stand and typing stand. It offers two viewing angles to meet your viewing and typing needs, freeing your hands so you can enjoy other entertainment.

Ultra-thin and Lightweight: The ultra-thin and lightweight hard-shell back cover design While providing superior protection for your valuable devices, it minimizes device size. All functions (camera, speaker, ports, and buttons) remain fully functional.

Auto Wake/Sleep: This iPad case features an auto wake/sleep function. Simply open or close the case to intelligently wake or shut down your tablet, extending battery life and protecting your iPad. Easy to use and effectively extends battery life.

specifications_table.Compatible Devices: For iPad 9th Generation 2021 / iPad 8th Generation 2020 / iPad 7th Generation 10.2" 2019 tablet (Model: A2602, A2603, A2604, A2605, A2270, A2428, A2429, A2430, A2197, A2198, A2200)
